tool.name: mine_additional_attack_surface
tool.description: Mine extra attack-surface artifacts from captured proxy traffic and responses, including OpenAPI/Swagger specs, GraphQL endpoints, persisted-query hints, JavaScript-discovered routes, and WebSocket endpoints, then seed them into the coverage ledger.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label for storing mined artifacts and seeded coverage.

parameter.name: max_request_pages
parameter.description: How many proxy-history pages to inspect. Default: 2.

parameter.name: page_size
parameter.description: How many requests to read per page. Default: 50.

parameter.name: max_response_samples
parameter.description: Maximum number of request/response pairs to inspect deeply for artifacts. Default: 20.

parameter.name: max_seed_items
parameter.description: Maximum number of mined artifacts or documented endpoints to return/seed. Default: 50.

parameter.name: httpql_filter
parameter.description: Optional HTTPQL filter for narrowing the source traffic.

parameter.name: scope_id
parameter.description: Optional Caido scope identifier for limiting the mined request set.

tool.name: list_mined_attack_surface
tool.description: List previously mined attack-surface artifacts for the current assessment root.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Optional target label. When provided, only that mined record is returned.

parameter.name: include_artifacts
parameter.description: Whether to include the mined artifact details in the response. Default: true.

parameter.name: max_items
parameter.description: Maximum number of mined records to return. Default: 50.
